workspacesweb.browsersettings.CfnAbout: This resource specifies browser settings that can be associated with a web portal. Once associated with a web portal, browser settings control how the browser will behave once a user starts a streaming session for the web portal.

workspacesweb.browsersettings.Additional.Description: Additional encryption context of the browser settings.

workspacesweb.browsersettings.BrowserPol.Description: A JSON string containing Chrome Enterprise policies that will be applied to all streaming sessions.

workspacesweb.browsersettings.CustomerMa.Description: The custom managed key of the browser settings.

workspacesweb.browsersettings.Tags.Description: The tags to add to the browser settings resource. A tag is a key-value pair.
